sql:
WITH key_pairs AS (
    SELECT nd.name AS director, na.name AS actor,
           p.director_id, p.actor_id
    FROM (VALUES
        ('Jordan, Neil', 'Rea, Stephen'),
        ('Rodriguez, Robert', 'Trejo, Danny'),
        ('Marshall, Garry', 'Elizondo, Hector'),
        ('Farrelly, Bobby', 'Docky'),
        ('Lee, Spike', 'Turturro, John')
    ) AS v(dname, aname)
    JOIN name nd ON nd.name = v.dname
    JOIN name na ON na.name = v.aname
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT ci_dir.person_id AS director_id, ci_act.person_id AS actor_id
        FROM cast_info ci_dir
        JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        WHERE ci_dir.person_id = nd.id
          AND ci_act.person_id = na.id
          AND ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
          AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
        LIMIT 1
    ) p
),
pair_movies AS (
    SELECT kp.director, kp.actor, t.id AS movie_id
    FROM key_pairs kp
    JOIN cast_info ci_dir ON ci_dir.person_id = kp.director_id
        AND ci_dir.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
    JOIN cast_info ci_act ON ci_act.movie_id = ci_dir.movie_id
        AND ci_act.person_id = kp.actor_id
        AND ci_act.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
    JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_dir.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
      AND t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
)
SELECT pm.director, pm.actor, mi.info AS genre, COUNT(*) AS film_count
FROM pair_movies pm
JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = pm.movie_id
  AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
GROUP BY pm.director, pm.actor, mi.info
ORDER BY pm.director, pm.actor, film_count DESC;
